name: Odysseus and Child- Monster
description:
20 years…it took 20 years. But now, he’s home. Finally.

First thing to do, as badly as he wanted to find his wife and his twins, was to remove the houseguests. One by one, in the dark of night, they fell.

As he moved down the hallway, he hears a scream. A female scream.

Throwing open the door, he sees a man looming over a young woman….who resembles Penelope in such a way that his blood froze. Then it boiled.
creator: Kate_the_okay
